headline: WELL Health Partners with AliveCor to Bring AI-Powered Cardiac Monitoring and Cardiologist Oversight to Canadians
summary: VANCOUVER, British Columbia, April 02, 2026--WELL Health Technologies Corp. (TSX: WELL, OTCQX: WHTCF) (the "Company" or "WELL"), a digital healthcare company focused on positively impacting health outcomes by leveraging technology to empower healthcare practitioners and their patients globally, is pleased to announce a strategic partnership with AliveCor, Inc.
